visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a middle-aged male (Tim) speaking directly into a selfie camera. He is wearing a white t-shirt with a heart logo, a grey patterned flat cap, and thick-rimmed glasses, standing in front of a vibrant red wall with white text. (2) The scene cuts to a wide shot of a large exhibition hall featuring a massive red banner that reads "Nintendo Switch 2 Taipei" and displays a large graphic of a Nintendo Switch console. Several staff members in red t-shirts are visible standing in the background near organized queue lines. (3) Tim returns to the frame in a selfie shot, gesturing towards the background banner while excitedly talking. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of an indoor exhibition center with high ceilings and industrial trusses visible. (4) The camera pans across various exhibits, showing a digital display screen with a floor map and game titles. Handheld shots capture close-ups of specific game demo stations including "Mario Kart" and "Donkey Kong," with colorful graphics and logos prominent on the screens. (5) A series of quick cuts showcase a display case with Nintendo Switch retail boxes, including a "Mario Kart 8 Deluxe" bundle. Price tags and promotional details are shown through close-up insert shots. (6) The video concludes with the main character holding up a red promotional towel with the Nintendo Switch logo, smiling and pointing towards the camera as the background remains the bustling exhibition hall floor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 大家好 我是Tim哥. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. (2) [Slogan]: 本活動採抽籤制，僅限已事前報名並獲得入場資格者入場。有抽中的人記得早點來～. [Subtitle]: 我們現在在台灣場的. (3) [Slogan]: Switch 2 體驗會 Taipei. (4) [Subtitle]: 7月10號 台灣版即將開賣! (5) [Slogan]: 花博爭艷館. (6) [Subtitle]: 瑪利歐賽車在。這裡. (7) [Slogan]: 必買遊戲之一! [Subtitle]: 它在7月17會正式上市. (8) [Subtitle]: 有十款!! (9) [Subtitle]: 15580元. [Subtitle]: 14380元. (10) [Slogan]: 送限量毛巾!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim), approximately 5 staff members in red uniforms, and 6 visitors visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a white t-shirt with a 'Human Made' heart logo, a grey plaid flat cap, round tortoise-shell glasses, and a red lanyard around his neck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor exhibition venue featuring red branding banners, game demo kiosks with monitors, industrial ceiling trusses, and product display shelves under bright overhead lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and clarity, greeting the audience in Traditional Chinese. The tone is enthusiastic and welcoming. Upbeat electronic background music with a steady 126 BPM drum beat begins immediately, maintaining a consistent level beneath the vocals. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as a new text graphic appears on screen. The narrator's speech rate is moderately fast, conveying excitement about the event. Distant, low-frequency crowd chatter is audible, creating an authentic atmosphere of a busy venue. (3) The acoustic texture shifts slightly as the narrator moves through different areas of the hall, but his voice remains front and center due to close-range mic capture. The music continues without pauses, featuring bright synthesizer pads and a rhythmic electronic bassline. (4) In the final phase, the vocal intensity increases slightly as the narrator announces a promotional giveaway. A final bubbly sound effect plays as the video ends, with the music fading out quickly alongside the sign-off.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Event Intro -> Product Highlights -> Logistics/Pricing -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and document the Nintendo Switch experience event in Taipei, providing viewers with key details on game demos, bundle pricing, and promotional gifts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, retail pricing information, and promotion of a specific event location and dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media influencer vlog featuring high-density text overlays and energetic editing to maintain viewer engagement for tech promotion.
